description_long: This is a plush gnome doll featuring a tall, pointed blue hat adorned with a white star. The gnome has a round, soft body covered in a blue and white patterned sweater with tree motifs and two white buttons. Its face is mostly obscured by the hat, showing only a round pink nose and a long, white mustache. The arms and legs are stubby and made of a dark gray fabric, giving the toy a whimsical, cozy appearance. The overall design is charming and festive, suitable for decorative or playful use in urban settings such as parks or neighborhood displays. The craftsmanship appears detailed, with careful attention to the textures and patterns on the clothing.
description: A plush gnome doll with a tall blue hat, white star, patterned sweater, and a long white mustache. Its round body and stubby limbs give it a whimsical, cozy look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the gnome's face with a pink nose, white mustache, blue hat with a star, and patterned sweater with buttons.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hat, mustache, and the side of the patterned sweater and arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the tall blue hat and the full patterned sweater, with both arms visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side of the hat, mustache, and arm, with the sweater's pattern visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with only a round pink nose and a long white mustache visible beneath the hat. No eyes or mouth are shown, giving it a mysterious and whimsical appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms slightly out to the sides and legs spread apart, the head is slightly forward under the tall hat.
